sql: SELECT a.suserid, a.sgamecode, SUM(a.ionlinetime) AS ionlinetime FROM dws_mgamejp_login_user_activity_di a JOIN dim_vplayerid_vies_df b ON a.suserid = b.suserid WHERE a.dtstatdate >= 20250530 AND a.dtstatdate <= 20250724 AND b.dtstatdate = '20250724' AND b.itag = 'domain_term_1a26edf94a' AND a.sgamecode IN ('initiatived','jordass','esports','allianceforce','strategy','playzone','su') AND a.saccounttype = '-100' AND a.suseridtype IN ('qq','wxid') AND a.splattype = '-100' AND a.splat = '-100' GROUP BY a.suserid, a.sgamecode;

SELECT DISTINCT vplayerid FROM dws_argothek_ce1_cbt2_vplayerid_suserid_di WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20250717' AND '20250723' AND itemp2 > 0 AND platid = 255 AND vplayerid NOT IN (SELECT vplayerid FROM dim_extract_311381_conf WHERE vplayerid IN ('pkg7', 'pkg2', 'pkg1'))

SELECT DISTINCT a.iuserid
FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di a
JOIN dim_argothek_gplayerid2qqwxid_df b ON a.iuserid = b.iuserid
JOIN dws_mgamejp_login_user_activity_di c ON b.suserid = c.suserid
WHERE a.statis_date >= 20250101 AND a.statis_date <= 20250131
AND c.dtstatdate >= 20250101 AND c.dtstatdate <= 20250131
AND c.sgamecode = 'initiatived'
AND c.saccounttype = '-100'
AND c.suseridtype IN ('qq', 'wxid')
AND c.splattype IN ('-100', 'PC')
AND c.splat = '-100';

SELECT SPLIT_PART(a.vrolename, '#', 1) AS nickname, COUNT(DISTINCT a.iuserid) AS user_count FROM dwd_argothek_playerlogin_hi a WHERE a.dteventtime >= '2023-07-12 00:00:00' AND a.dteventtime <= '2025-07-15 23:59:59' GROUP BY SPLIT_PART(a.vrolename, '#', 1) ORDER BY user_count DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT t1.vplayerid FROM dws_argothek_ce1_cbt2_vplayerid_suserid_di AS t1 INNER JOIN dim_argothek_gplayerid2qqwxid_df AS t2 ON t1.suserid = t2.suserid WHERE t1.dtstatdate >= '20250612' AND t1.dtstatdate <= '20250714' AND t1.itag = 'T2' AND t2.iregdate < '20250529';

SELECT
 dtstatdate AS domain_term_b6fed9af83,
 iregway AS domain_term_f0ae82e4aa,
 COUNT(DISTINCT vplayerid) AS domain_term_3b6cf1cef7
FROM dws_argothek_ce1_cbt2_vplayerid_suserid_di
WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20250703' AND '20250706'
 AND sourcename IN ('domain_term_0d39e60742', 'domain_term_eb63e9db8d')
 AND iregway IN ('89903934', '89903933', '89903932', '89902725', '89902724', '89902723', '89900960', '89900961', '89900962')
 AND dtstatdate = iregdate
GROUP BY dtstatdate, iregway
ORDER BY dtstatdate, iregway

WITH base AS (
 SELECT
 SUBSTR(t.dteventtime, 1, 7) AS month,
 t.gamepodid AS gamepodid,
 SUBSTR(t.dteventtime, 1, 13) AS hour_bucket,
 t.dteventtime AS dteventtime,
 t.matchid AS matchid,
 t.queueid AS queueid
 FROM dwd_argothek_matchdetails_hi t
 WHERE t.dteventtime >= '2025-04-01 00:00:00'
 AND t.dteventtime <= '2025-06-30 23:59:59'
 AND t.queueid IN ('swiftplay','competitive','unrated')
 AND LOWER(t.completionstate) IN ('completed','surrendered')
 AND t.gamepodid IS NOT NULL AND t.gamepodid <> ''
),
monthly_counts AS (
 SELECT
 b.month,
 b.gamepodid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT b.matchid) AS total_game_end_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.queueid = 'competitive' THEN b.matchid END) AS competitive_end_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.queueid = 'unrated' THEN b.matchid END) AS unrated_end_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.queueid = 'swiftplay' THEN b.matchid END) AS swiftplay_end_cnt
 FROM base b
 GROUP BY b.month, b.gamepodid
),
hourly_cnt AS (
 SELECT
 b.month,
 b.gamepodid,
 b.hour_bucket,
 COUNT(DISTINCT b.matchid) AS hour_end_cnt
 FROM base b
 GROUP BY b.month, b.gamepodid, b.hour_bucket
),
peak_ranked AS (
 SELECT
 h.month,
 h.gamepodid,
 h.hour_bucket,
 h.hour_end_cnt,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
 PARTITION BY h.month, h.gamepodid
 ORDER BY h.hour_end_cnt DESC, h.hour_bucket ASC
 ) AS rn
 FROM hourly_cnt h
),
peak_final AS (
 SELECT
 b.month,
 b.gamepodid,
 CONCAT(r.hour_bucket, ':00:00') AS peak_time,
 r.hour_end_cnt AS peak_hour_end_cnt
 FROM peak_ranked r
 JOIN (
 SELECT DISTINCT month, gamepodid, hour_bucket
 FROM base
 ) b
 ON r.month = b.month
 AND r.gamepodid = b.gamepodid
 AND r.hour_bucket = b.hour_bucket
 WHERE r.rn = 1
)
SELECT
 mc.month AS `domain_term_51d806399a`,
 mc.gamepodid AS `domain_term_2b32cc53ab`,
 pf.peak_time AS `domain_term_551433f0db`,
 pf.peak_hour_end_cnt AS `domain_term_38aff2bd56`,
 mc.total_game_end_cnt AS `domain_term_988f7795d7`,
 mc.competitive_end_cnt AS `domain_term_c1d0a983b0`,
 mc.unrated_end_cnt AS `domain_term_27559c8192`,
 mc.swiftplay_end_cnt AS `domain_term_5bbed3de2f`
FROM monthly_counts mc
JOIN peak_final pf
 ON mc.month = pf.month
 AND mc.gamepodid = pf.gamepodid
ORDER BY mc.month, mc.gamepodid;

SELECT b.city_level, COUNT(DISTINCT a.suserid) AS user_count
FROM dim_mgamejp_account_allinfo_nf a
JOIN dim_uf_player_gameinfo_mf b ON a.suserid = b.userid AND b.kp_imp_date = '202506'
WHERE a.dtstatdate = 20250702
AND a.saccounttype = '-100'
AND a.suseridtype IN ('qq','wxid')
AND a.sgamecode IN ('esports','mobile_live','initiatived','allianceforce','strategy','jordass','su','playzone','battlezone','battlearena','weapon','playhub','manager','apgame')
AND a.splattype = '-100'
AND a.ilastactdate >= 20250104
GROUP BY b.city_level;

WITH season_ranges AS (
 SELECT
 seasonidname,
 idate AS start_date,
 LEAD(idate, 1, '99991231') OVER (ORDER BY idate) AS end_date
 FROM dim_argothek_seasondate_df
 WHERE dtstatdate = '20250615'
),
bp_defined_items AS (
 SELECT DISTINCT purchasedItemId
 FROM dwd_argothek_commercialization_gearid_df
 WHERE dtstatdate = '20250615'
 AND purchaseSource = 'BATTLEPASS_PROGRESS'
 AND itemtype = 'd5f120f8-ff8c-4aac-92ea-f2b5acbe9475'
),
purchases AS (
 SELECT
 p.purchasedItemId AS item_id,
 s.seasonidname,
 p.vtemp1 AS user_id
 FROM dwd_argothek_commercialization_gearid_df p
 JOIN season_ranges s
 ON p.idate >= s.start_date AND p.idate < s.end_date
 WHERE p.dtstatdate = '20250615'
 AND p.purchaseSource = 'BATTLEPASS_PROGRESS'
 AND p.itemtype = 'd5f120f8-ff8c-4aac-92ea-f2b5acbe9475'
 AND p.idate BETWEEN '20230712' AND '20250615'
),
raw_usage_union AS (
 -- 1. Gun Skin Usage
 SELECT
 e.expressionassetid AS item_id,
 l.subject AS user_id,
 SUBSTR(e.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS date_str
 FROM dwd_argothek_playerloadout_expressions_hi e
 JOIN dwd_argothek_playerloadout_hi l
 ON e.apeventid = l.apeventid
 AND e.tdbank_imp_date = l.tdbank_imp_date
 WHERE e.expressiontypeid = 'd5f120f8-ff8c-4aac-92ea-f2b5acbe9475'
 AND SUBSTR(e.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20230712' AND '20250615'

 UNION ALL

 -- 2. Spray Slot Usage
 SELECT
 sp.sprayid AS item_id,
 sp.subject AS user_id,
 SUBSTR(sp.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS date_str
 FROM dwd_argothek_playerloadout_sprayslots_hi sp
 WHERE SUBSTR(sp.tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20230712' AND '20250615'
),
validated_usage AS (
 SELECT
 u.item_id,
 s.seasonidname,
 u.user_id
 FROM raw_usage_union u
 JOIN season_ranges s
 ON u.date_str >= s.start_date AND u.date_str < s.end_date
 -- Constraint: Usage item must be a verified BP item
 JOIN bp_defined_items bpi
 ON u.item_id = bpi.purchasedItemId
),
p_agg AS (
 SELECT item_id, seasonidname, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS buy_cnt
 FROM purchases GROUP BY item_id, seasonidname
),
u_agg AS (
 SELECT item_id, seasonidname, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS use_cnt
 FROM validated_usage GROUP BY item_id, seasonidname
)
SELECT
 COALESCE(p.item_id, u.item_id) AS item_id,
 COALESCE(p.seasonidname, u.seasonidname) AS season_name,
 COALESCE(u.use_cnt, 0) AS current_season_use_cnt,
 COALESCE(p.buy_cnt, 0) AS current_season_buy_cnt
FROM p_agg p
FULL OUTER JOIN u_agg u
 ON p.item_id = u.item_id AND p.seasonidname = u.seasonidname
ORDER BY item_id, season_name

WITH active_users AS ( SELECT DISTINCT iuserid FROM dws_argothek_oss_useractivity_df WHERE statis_date = 20250617 AND iworldid = 255 AND INSTR(SUBSTRING(iactivity, 71, 30), '1') > 0 ), all_items_owners AS ( SELECT iuserid FROM dwd_argothek_gearrecord_df WHERE dtstatdate = '20250617' AND iGoodsId IN ( '71d260ca-4bad-81f2-0298-44860341a7a6', '48601754-442d-98cb-2109-3fb2075500ec', 'a9126263-439c-7be6-d668-52a6c0c0a36f', '34ecc788-4034-71d2-a0ac-c398b8ecb2ae', '56f98991-43f8-dcc8-189e-08b7ae6c42ad', '8453f8ef-4c0b-46e2-8768-3e9e45c67a2c', '06d90274-435f-3e32-9d57-26bc228ae2e5', '8196dea4-4229-c951-13a9-088fb13b3512', '3abc330f-444a-6dfd-5863-81856ba62624', '041a43a4-46fe-dab7-c974-36bf91eab33d', '5b863cb9-4e41-ec89-69ee-49a223d05ff1' ) GROUP BY iuserid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT iGoodsId) = 11 ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.iuserid) AS `domain_term_d8c84172ac30domain_term_bdfec5a82c`, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.iuserid) AS `domain_term_d8c84172ac30domain_term_dee95c3fb3` FROM active_users AS T1 LEFT JOIN all_items_owners AS T2 ON T1.iuserid = T2.iuserid;

WITH active_users AS (
 -- domain_term_ac75b0221320230712domain_term_43401e739e20250612domain_term_24cd18eefa，domain_term_d03e144984>30domain_term_c3304d1e49，domain_term_67252358f920250312domain_term_909350a7cf
 SELECT
 iuserid
 FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di
 WHERE statis_date BETWEEN '20230712' AND '20250612'
 GROUP BY iuserid
 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT statis_date) > 30
 AND MAX(statis_date) < '20250312'
),
high_value_users AS (
 -- domain_term_74e5194e331500domain_term_622f3c5acb(150000domain_term_0d7416e2e2)domain_term_f07f0f7bd4QQ/WXdomain_term_9ba763ea34，domain_term_935d48533c
 SELECT
 iuserid
 FROM dws_argothek_oss_portaltransaction_di
 WHERE vusertype IN ('qq', 'wx')
 GROUP BY iuserid
 HAVING SUM(ftranamt) > 150000
),
dim_direct_wx AS (
 -- domain_term_9132e087f11：domain_term_f2d79e3fc4 (PlayerID -> WXID)，domain_term_a92e1496b1
 SELECT DISTINCT
 splayerid,
 swxid
 FROM dim_mgamejp_tbplayerid2wxid_nf
 WHERE sappid IN ('qq', 'wx')
),
dim_bridge_qq AS (
 -- domain_term_9132e087f12domain_term_d13bfa13caA：domain_term_d43dd2a176QQdomain_term_1f7802650e (PlayerID -> QQ)
 SELECT DISTINCT
 splayerid,
 iqq
 FROM dim_mgamejp_tbplayerid2qq_nf
 WHERE sappid IN ('qq', 'wx')
),
dim_bridge_qq2wx AS (
 -- domain_term_9132e087f12domain_term_d13bfa13caB：domain_term_d43dd2a176QQdomain_term_b60418e5e4 (QQ -> WXID)
 SELECT DISTINCT
 iqq,
 swxid
 FROM dim_mgamejp_idconversion_wxid_qq_nf
)
SELECT DISTINCT
 COALESCE(d1.swxid, d3.swxid) AS wxid
FROM active_users u
LEFT JOIN high_value_users h
 ON u.iuserid = h.iuserid
LEFT JOIN dim_direct_wx d1
 ON u.iuserid = d1.splayerid
LEFT JOIN dim_bridge_qq d2
 ON u.iuserid = d2.splayerid
LEFT JOIN dim_bridge_qq2wx d3
 ON d2.iqq = d3.iqq
WHERE h.iuserid IS NULL -- domain_term_fceb7f7917
 AND COALESCE(d1.swxid, d3.swxid) IS NOT NULL; -- domain_term_2c328fa710wxid

SELECT DISTINCT d.suserid
FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di l
JOIN dim_argothek_gplayerid2qqwxid_df d ON l.iuserid = d.iuserid
WHERE l.statis_date >= 20250501 AND l.statis_date <= 20250531
AND d.dtstatdate = '20250610'
AND d.swxid_type = 'qq'
AND l.iuserid NOT IN (
 SELECT DISTINCT l2.iuserid
 FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di l2
 WHERE l2.statis_date >= 20250601 AND l2.statis_date <= 20250630
);

SELECT DISTINCT t1.iuserid AS gplayerid FROM dws_argothek_oss_useractivity_df AS t1 JOIN dim_argothek_gplayerid2qqwxid_df AS t2 ON t1.iuserid = t2.iuserid JOIN dws_mgamejp_login_user_activity_di AS t3 ON t2.suserid = t3.suserid AND t2.swxid_type = t3.suseridtype WHERE t1.statis_date = 20250531 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(REVERSE(RPAD(t1.iactivity, 128, '0')), 1, 31), '1') = 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(REVERSE(RPAD(t1.iactivity, 128, '0')), 32, 31), '1') > 0 AND t2.dtstatdate = '20250608' AND t3.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20250501 AND 20250531 AND t3.sgamecode = 'initiatived' AND t3.itimes >= 1 AND t3.saccounttype = '-100' AND t3.suseridtype IN ('qq', 'wxid') AND t3.splattype = 'PC' AND t3.splat = '-100';

SELECT
 SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS date_str,
 CASE
 WHEN competitivetier IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 'domain_term_9429eba2f6'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (6, 7, 8) THEN 'domain_term_8fe8875283'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (9, 10, 11) THEN 'domain_term_bc916383f6'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (12, 13, 14) THEN 'domain_term_3713947f42'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (15, 16, 17) THEN 'domain_term_e506cf878f'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (18, 19, 20) THEN 'domain_term_a768735ad5'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (21, 22, 23) THEN 'domain_term_ed5a47708f'
 WHEN competitivetier >= 24 THEN 'domain_term_329000b58d'
 ELSE 'domain_term_4117d4fbcd'
 END AS tier,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate != 'Surrendered' THEN matchid END) AS normal_match_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate = 'Surrendered' THEN matchid END) AS surrender_match_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate != 'Surrendered' AND ABS(2 * roundswon - roundsplayed) >= 6 THEN matchid END) AS diff_6_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate != 'Surrendered' AND ABS(2 * roundswon - roundsplayed) >= 8 THEN matchid END) AS diff_8_cnt
FROM
 dwd_argothek_playermatchstats_hi
WHERE
 tdbank_imp_date BETWEEN '2023071200' AND '2025053123'
 AND queueid = 'competitive'
GROUP BY
 SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8),
 CASE
 WHEN competitivetier IN (3, 4, 5) THEN 'domain_term_9429eba2f6'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (6, 7, 8) THEN 'domain_term_8fe8875283'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (9, 10, 11) THEN 'domain_term_bc916383f6'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (12, 13, 14) THEN 'domain_term_3713947f42'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (15, 16, 17) THEN 'domain_term_e506cf878f'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (18, 19, 20) THEN 'domain_term_a768735ad5'
 WHEN competitivetier IN (21, 22, 23) THEN 'domain_term_ed5a47708f'
 WHEN competitivetier >= 24 THEN 'domain_term_329000b58d'
 ELSE 'domain_term_4117d4fbcd'
 END

UNION ALL

-- domain_term_b2c57d92ca
SELECT
 SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS date_str,
 'domain_term_3fbcb17d04' AS tier,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate != 'Surrendered' THEN matchid END) AS normal_match_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate = 'Surrendered' THEN matchid END) AS surrender_match_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate != 'Surrendered' AND ABS(2 * roundswon - roundsplayed) >= 6 THEN matchid END) AS diff_6_cnt,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN completionstate != 'Surrendered' AND ABS(2 * roundswon - roundsplayed) >= 8 THEN matchid END) AS diff_8_cnt
FROM
 dwd_argothek_playermatchstats_hi
WHERE
 tdbank_imp_date BETWEEN '2023071200' AND '2025053123'
 AND queueid = 'competitive'
GROUP BY
 SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8);

SELECT t1.statis_date, t1.iloginway, COUNT(DISTINCT t1.iuserid)
FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di t1
WHERE t1.statis_date >= 20250506 AND t1.statis_date <= 20250512
AND t1.iloginway IN (1,10,11,12,35,20,28,29,30,31,32,33,34,36)
GROUP BY t1.statis_date, t1.iloginway
ORDER BY t1.statis_date, t1.iloginway;

SELECT DISTINCT
 t2.suserid AS qq
FROM (
 SELECT
 iuserid
 FROM
 dws_argothek_oss_login_di
 WHERE
 statis_date BETWEEN 20250330 AND 20250428
 AND iloginway = 3
 GROUP BY
 iuserid
 HAVING
 COUNT(DISTINCT statis_date) BETWEEN 5 AND 8
) t1
JOIN
 dim_argothek_gplayerid2qqwxid_df t2 ON t1.iuserid = t2.iuserid
WHERE
 t2.dtstatdate = '20250428'
 AND t2.swxid_type = 'qq';

SELECT DISTINCT t2.suserid AS qq
FROM dws_argothek_oss_login_di t1
JOIN dim_argothek_gplayerid2qqwxid_df t2 ON t1.iuserid = t2.iuserid
JOIN dim_argothek_gplayerid_vroleid_df t3 ON t1.iuserid = t3.iuserid
JOIN dwd_argothek_playermatchstats_hi t4 ON t3.vRoleID = t4.vroleid
WHERE t1.statis_date BETWEEN 20250324 AND 20250330
AND t1.iloginway = 3
AND t2.swxid_type = 'qq'
AND t4.ismatchcompleted = 1
AND t2.dtstatdate = '20250330'
AND t3.dtstatdate = '20250330'
AND SUBSTR(t4.dteventtime, 1, 10) BETWEEN '2025-03-24' AND '2025-03-30';

WITH player_counts AS (SELECT 'e370fa57-4757-3604-3648-499e1f642d3f' AS hero_id, subject AS player_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchdetail_hi WHERE provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking' AND characterid IN ('e370fa57-4757-3604-3648-499e1f642d3f', 'cc8b64c8-4b25-4ff9-6e7f-37b4da43d235') AND dteventtime >= '2023-07-26 00:00:00' AND dteventtime <= '2023-08-01 23:59:59' AND tdbank_imp_date >= '2023072600' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2023080123' GROUP BY subject UNION ALL SELECT '0e38b510-41a8-5780-5e8f-568b2a4f2d6c' AS hero_id, subject AS player_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchdetail_hi WHERE provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking' AND characterid = '0e38b510-41a8-5780-5e8f-568b2a4f2d6c' AND dteventtime >= '2023-11-01 00:00:00' AND dteventtime <= '2023-11-07 23:59:59' AND tdbank_imp_date >= '2023110100' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2023110723' GROUP BY subject UNION ALL SELECT '1dbf2edd-4729-0984-3115-daa5eed44993' AS hero_id, subject AS player_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchdetail_hi WHERE provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking' AND characterid = '1dbf2edd-4729-0984-3115-daa5eed44993' AND dteventtime >= '2024-03-27 00:00:00' AND dteventtime <= '2024-04-02 23:59:59' AND tdbank_imp_date >= '2024032700' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2024040223' GROUP BY subject UNION ALL SELECT 'efba5359-4016-a1e5-7626-b1ae76895940' AS hero_id, subject AS player_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchdetail_hi WHERE provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking' AND characterid = 'efba5359-4016-a1e5-7626-b1ae76895940' AND dteventtime >= '2024-08-29 00:00:00' AND dteventtime <= '2024-09-04 23:59:59' AND tdbank_imp_date >= '2024082900' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2024090423' GROUP BY subject UNION ALL SELECT 'b444168c-4e35-8076-db47-ef9bf368f384' AS hero_id, subject AS player_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchdetail_hi WHERE provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking' AND characterid = 'b444168c-4e35-8076-db47-ef9bf368f384' AND dteventtime >= '2025-01-09 00:00:00' AND dteventtime <= '2025-01-15 23:59:59' AND tdbank_imp_date >= '2025010900' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2025011523' GROUP BY subject UNION ALL SELECT 'df1cb487-4902-002e-5c17-d28e83e78588' AS hero_id, subject AS player_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM dwd_argothek_playermatchdetail_hi WHERE provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking' AND characterid = 'df1cb487-4902-002e-5c17-d28e83e78588' AND dteventtime >= '2025-03-06 00:00:00' AND dteventtime <= '2025-03-12 23:59:59' AND tdbank_imp_date >= '2025030600' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2025031223' GROUP BY subject) SELECT hero_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN play_count > 3 THEN player_id ELSE NULL END) AS players_gt_3, COUNT(CASE WHEN play_count > 10 THEN player_id ELSE NULL END) AS players_gt_10, COUNT(player_id) AS total_players, COUNT(CASE WHEN play_count > 3 THEN player_id ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(player_id) AS ratio_gt_3, COUNT(CASE WHEN play_count > 10 THEN player_id ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(player_id) AS ratio_gt_10 FROM player_counts GROUP BY hero_id;

SELECT
 SUM(CASE WHEN e.tag = 'EnemiesBlinded' THEN e.amount ELSE 0 END) AS domain_term_5960d51f4bxdomain_term_5e5b8169ee,
 SUM(CASE WHEN e.tag = 'AlliesBlinded' THEN e.amount ELSE 0 END) AS domain_term_3b2589a0cdxdomain_term_5e5b8169ee
FROM dwd_argothek_abilityinfo_effects_hi e
INNER JOIN dwd_argothek_matchdetails_hi m
ON e.matchinfomatchid = m.matchid
WHERE
 m.provisioningflowid = 'Matchmaking'
 AND e.dteventtime BETWEEN '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2024-12-16 23:59:59'
 AND m.dteventtime BETWEEN '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2024-12-16 23:59:59'
 AND e.tag IN ('EnemiesBlinded', 'AlliesBlinded');

WITH monthly_data AS (SELECT substr(dtstatdate,1,6) as month, vplayerid, dregdate, CASE substr(dtstatdate,1,6) WHEN '202403' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,1,31),'0','')) WHEN '202404' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,1,30),'0','')) WHEN '202405' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,1,31),'0','')) WHEN '202406' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,1,30),'0','')) END as current_days, CASE substr(dtstatdate,1,6) WHEN '202403' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,32,29),'0','')) WHEN '202404' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,31,31),'0','')) WHEN '202405' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,32,30),'0','')) WHEN '202406' THEN length(replace(substr(cbitmap,31,31),'0','')) END as prev_days FROM dws_jordass_login_df WHERE dtstatdate IN ('20240331','20240430','20240531','20240630') AND platid = 255), classified AS (SELECT month, vplayerid, CASE WHEN substr(dregdate,1,6) = month THEN 'new' WHEN prev_days = 0 AND current_days > 0 THEN 'return' WHEN prev_days > 0 AND current_days BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'light_retain' WHEN prev_days > 0 AND current_days BETWEEN 5 AND 15 THEN 'medium_retain' WHEN prev_days > 0 AND current_days >= 16 THEN 'heavy_retain' END as user_type FROM monthly_data WHERE current_days > 0) SELECT month, count(distinct CASE WHEN user_type = 'new' THEN vplayerid END) as new_users, count(distinct CASE WHEN user_type = 'return' THEN vplayerid END) as return_users, count(distinct CASE WHEN user_type = 'light_retain' THEN vplayerid END) as light_retain, count(distinct CASE WHEN user_type = 'medium_retain' THEN vplayerid END) as medium_retain, count(distinct CASE WHEN user_type = 'heavy_retain' THEN vplayerid END) as heavy_retain FROM classified GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;
SELECT dtstatdate, COUNT(DISTINCT vplayerid) FROM dws_jordass_login_di WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20240103' AND platid = 255 GROUP BY dtstatdate ORDER BY dtstatdate;

WITH button_users AS (
 SELECT
 a.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.buttontype = '400211' THEN 1 END) > 0
 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.buttontype = '400212' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN '400211&400212'
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.buttontype = '400211' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN '400211'
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.buttontype = '400212' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN '400212'
 ELSE 'other'
 END AS user_type
 FROM dws_jordass_buttonpress_pre_di a
 WHERE a.dtstatdate >= 20241001 AND a.dtstatdate <= 20241031
 AND a.buttontype IN ('400211', '400212')
 GROUP BY a.vplayerid
),
gender_latest AS (
 SELECT
 b.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN b.gender = 1 THEN 'male'
 WHEN b.gender = 2 THEN 'female'
 ELSE 'other'
 END AS game_gender
 FROM (
 SELECT
 c.vplayerid,
 c.gender,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.vplayerid ORDER BY c.dteventtime DESC) as rn
 FROM dwd_jordass_playerlogin_hi c
 WHERE SUBSTR(c.dteventtime, 1, 10) >= '2024-10-01'
 AND SUBSTR(c.dteventtime, 1, 10) <= '2024-10-31'
 ) b
 WHERE b.rn = 1
),
paradise_activity AS (
 SELECT
 d.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT d.dtstatdate) BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'light'
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT d.dtstatdate) BETWEEN 5 AND 15 THEN 'medium'
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT d.dtstatdate) >= 16 THEN 'heavy'
 ELSE 'other'
 END AS paradise_activity_level
 FROM dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di d
 WHERE d.dtstatdate >= 20241001 AND d.dtstatdate <= 20241031
 GROUP BY d.vplayerid
),
jordass_activity AS (
 SELECT
 e.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.dtstatdate) BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'light'
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.dtstatdate) BETWEEN 5 AND 15 THEN 'medium'
 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.dtstatdate) >= 16 THEN 'heavy'
 ELSE 'other'
 END AS jordass_activity_level
 FROM dws_jordass_login_di e
 WHERE e.dtstatdate >= 20241001 AND e.dtstatdate <= 20241031
 GROUP BY e.vplayerid
)
SELECT
 COALESCE(f.user_type, 'other') AS user_type,
 COALESCE(g.game_gender, 'other') AS game_gender,
 COALESCE(h.paradise_activity_level, 'other') AS paradise_activity_level,
 COALESCE(i.jordass_activity_level, 'other') AS jordass_activity_level,
 COUNT(DISTINCT f.vplayerid) AS user_count
FROM button_users f
LEFT JOIN gender_latest g ON f.vplayerid = g.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN paradise_activity h ON f.vplayerid = h.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN jordass_activity i ON f.vplayerid = i.vplayerid
GROUP BY
 COALESCE(f.user_type, 'other'),
 COALESCE(g.game_gender, 'other'),
 COALESCE(h.paradise_activity_level, 'other'),
 COALESCE(i.jordass_activity_level, 'other');

 )

user_aggregated AS (

 WHEN total_score >= 2 AND total_score < 3 THEN '[2,3)'

 END

 UNION ALL SELECT 20241127
 UNION ALL SELECT 20241128
),
device_users AS (

),
survival_users AS (
 SELECT
 t2.dtstatdate,
 t2.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN t2.device_type = 0 THEN 'domain_term_9c01ad0911'
 WHEN t2.device_type IN (1, 5) THEN 'domain_term_4b90f29fa5'
 ELSE 'domain_term_1a26edf94a'
 END AS device_type_name
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di t2

 AND t2.device_type IN (0, 1, 5)

),
next_day_survival AS (
 SELECT
 t2.dtstatdate,
 t2.vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN t2.device_type = 0 THEN 'domain_term_9c01ad0911'
 WHEN t2.device_type IN (1, 5) THEN 'domain_term_4b90f29fa5'
 ELSE 'domain_term_1a26edf94a'
 END AS device_type_name
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di t2
 WHERE t2.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20241124 AND 20241129
 AND t2.modename = 'domain_term_41ca2be751'
 AND t2.device_type IN (0, 1, 5)
 GROUP BY t2.dtstatdate, t2.vplayerid, t2.device_type
),
user_reg_year AS (

 t3.vplayerid,
 SUBSTR(t3.dregdate, 1, 4) AS reg_year
 FROM dws_jordass_login_df t3
 WHERE t3.dtstatdate = 20241128
 AND t3.platid = 255
 AND t3.dregdate IS NOT NULL
 AND LENGTH(t3.dregdate) = 8
 GROUP BY t3.vplayerid, SUBSTR(t3.dregdate, 1, 4)
)
SELECT
 dr.dtstatdate AS `domain_term_77282a67dd`,
 du.device_type_name AS `domain_term_47a991d18c`,
 ury.reg_year AS `domain_term_6892b159ce`,
 COUNT(DISTINCT du.vplayerid) AS `domain_term_e1ff86bfe8`,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN su.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN du.vplayerid END) AS `domain_term_9d3f470174`,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN su.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN du.vplayerid END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT du.vplayerid), 0) AS `domain_term_600dda6790`,
 COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nds.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN su.vplayerid END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT su.vplayerid), 0) AS `domain_term_b538aead7a`
FROM date_range dr
LEFT JOIN device_users du ON dr.dtstatdate = du.dtstatdate
LEFT JOIN user_reg_year ury ON du.vplayerid = ury.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN survival_users su ON du.dtstatdate = su.dtstatdate
 AND du.vplayerid = su.vplayerid
 AND du.device_type_name = su.device_type_name
LEFT JOIN next_day_survival nds ON du.dtstatdate + 1 = nds.dtstatdate
 AND su.vplayerid = nds.vplayerid
 AND su.device_type_name = nds.device_type_name
WHERE ury.reg_year IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY dr.dtstatdate, du.device_type_name, ury.reg_year
ORDER BY dr.dtstatdate, du.device_type_name, ury.reg_year;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t1.imode = 1307095884553538304 AND t1.platid <> 255 THEN t1.vplayerid END) AS yinni_users, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t1.imode = 1307095884553538304 AND t1.platid <> 255 AND t2.imode = 1310822585431254784 AND t2.platid <> 255 THEN t1.vplayerid END) AS yinni_qiaoliang_users, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t1.imode = 1307095884553538304 AND t1.platid <> 255 AND t3.mode = 2370 THEN t1.vplayerid END) AS yinni_yinnimode_users FROM dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di t1 LEFT JOIN dws_jordass_matchlog_stat_di t2 ON t1.vplayerid = t2.vplayerid AND t2.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20230719 AND 20230725 AND t2.imode = 1310822585431254784 AND t2.platid <> 255 LEFT JOIN dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di t3 ON t1.vplayerid = t3.vplayerid AND t3.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20230719 AND 20230725 AND t3.mode = 2370 WHERE t1.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20230719 AND 20230725 AND t1.imode = 1307095884553538304 AND t1.platid <> 255;

SELECT t1.dtstatdate AS `domain_term_1ddc5f9129`, CASE WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) = '1' THEN 'domain_term_6dae199fa1' WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) = '2' THEN 'domain_term_bc916383f6' WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) = '3' THEN 'domain_term_3713947f42' WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) = '4' THEN 'domain_term_868b6db912' WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) = '5' THEN 'domain_term_c69716199f' WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) = '6' THEN 'domain_term_2602f9e563' WHEN substr(COALESCE(t2.seasonmaxsegment, '0'), 1, 1) >= '7' THEN 'domain_term_51b4f9b2b3' ELSE 'domain_term_4117d4fbcd' END AS `domain_term_a4fa483d91`, COUNT(DISTINCT t1.vplayerid) AS `domain_term_fef566845d`, COUNT(DISTINCT t3.vplayerid) AS `domain_term_2515d26f54`, COUNT(DISTINCT t3.vplayerid) / COUNT(DISTINCT t1.vplayerid) AS `domain_term_8a0ce9ab48` FROM (SELECT dtstatdate, vplayerid FROM dws_jordass_login_di WHERE dtstatdate IN ('20240902', '20240903', '20250908', '20250909') AND platid = 255) t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT substr(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) as dtstatdate, vplayerid, MAX(seasonmaxsegment) as seasonmaxsegment FROM dwd_jordass_playerlogin_hi WHERE substr(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) IN ('20240902', '20240903', '20250908', '20250909') GROUP BY 1, 2) t2 ON t1.dtstatdate = t2.dtstatdate AND t1.vplayerid = t2.vplayerid LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT dtstatdate, vplayerid FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di WHERE dtstatdate IN ('20240902', '20240903', '20250908', '20250909') AND modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd' AND submodename LIKE 'CG%') t3 ON t1.dtstatdate = t3.dtstatdate AND t1.vplayerid = t3.vplayerid GROUP BY t1.dtstatdate, `domain_term_a4fa483d91`;

SELECT
 SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) AS domain_term_77282a67dd,
 productid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT vplayerid) AS domain_term_7e633fb364,
 SUM(money) AS domain_term_149e03ae07,
 SUM(goodsnum) AS domain_term_f27bacd85e
FROM dwd_jordass_directpaycommflow_hi
WHERE
 op = 'take'
 AND opres = 'ok'
 AND productid IN ('package_6', 'package_18', 'outfit_pack', 'weapon_pack')
 AND SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20250901' AND '20250910'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date,1,8), productid
ORDER BY domain_term_77282a67dd, productid;

SELECT
 date as `domain_term_77282a67dd`,
 cast(sum(recharge_amt) as bigint) as `domain_term_85becfe6c6`,
 cast(sum(consume_amt) as bigint) as `domain_term_080d439ce4`
FROM (
 -- Recharge from DWS Water (Filter platid=255 for all-platform summary)
 SELECT
 dtstatdate as date,
 sum(imoney) as recharge_amt,
 0 as consume_amt
 FROM dws_jordass_water_di
 WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240101' AND '20250601'
 AND platid = 255
 GROUP BY dtstatdate

 UNION ALL

 -- Consumed Gold from DWD Currency Log (AddOrReduce=1, imoneytype=1)
 SELECT
 substring(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) as date,
 0 as recharge_amt,
 sum(imoney) as consume_amt
 FROM dwd_jordass_currencylog_hi
 WHERE tdbank_imp_date >= '2024010100' AND tdbank_imp_date <= '2025060123'
 AND AddOrReduce = 1
 AND imoneytype = 1
 GROUP BY substring(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8)
) t
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t1.dteventtime >= '2022-01-18' AND t1.dteventtime <= '2022-01-24' THEN t1.vplayerid END) AS period1_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t1.dteventtime >= '2021-10-19' AND t1.dteventtime <= '2021-12-20' THEN t1.vplayerid END) AS period2_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t1.dteventtime >= '2022-01-18' AND t1.dteventtime <= '2022-01-24' AND t1.vplayerid IN (SELECT t2.vplayerid FROM dwd_jordass_activitypress_hi t2 WHERE t2.dteventtime >= '2021-10-19' AND t2.dteventtime <= '2021-12-20' AND t2.buttontype = 99123 AND t2.ireason = 3) THEN t1.vplayerid END) AS overlap_count FROM dwd_jordass_activitypress_hi t1 WHERE t1.buttontype = 99123 AND t1.ireason = 3 AND ((t1.dteventtime >= '2022-01-18' AND t1.dteventtime <= '2022-01-24') OR (t1.dteventtime >= '2021-10-19' AND t1.dteventtime <= '2021-12-20'));

 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20'

 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 51 AND 80 THEN '51-80'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN '81-100'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 101 AND 200 THEN '101-200'

 COUNT(DISTINCT t.vplayerid) AS user_count

 AND t2.teamrank = 1
 GROUP BY t2.vplayerid
) t
GROUP BY
 CASE
 WHEN t.total_wins = 1 THEN '1'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 2 AND 10 THEN '2-10'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 21 AND 50 THEN '21-50'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 51 AND 80 THEN '51-80'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN '81-100'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 101 AND 200 THEN '101-200'
 WHEN t.total_wins BETWEEN 201 AND 500 THEN '201-500'
 ELSE '501domain_term_496edef086'
 END
ORDER BY MIN(t.total_wins);

 )
 AND mode IN (101, 102, 103, 401, 402, 403)

WITH
base_users AS (
 SELECT vplayerid
 FROM dws_jordass_login_df
 WHERE dtstatdate = '20250225' AND platid = 255
),
active_status AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 CASE WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(cbitmap, 1, 90), '1') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_active_last_3m
 FROM dws_jordass_login_df
 WHERE dtstatdate = '20250225' AND platid = 255
),
recent_payment AS (
 SELECT DISTINCT vplayerid
 FROM dws_jordass_water_di
 WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20241127' AND '20250225' AND platid =255
),
historical_segment AS (
 SELECT vplayerid, MAX(historymaxsegment) AS historical_segment
 FROM dws_jordass_uid_login_df
 WHERE dtstatdate = '20250225'
 GROUP BY vplayerid
),
historical_payment AS (
 SELECT vplayerid, imoney
 FROM dws_jordass_water_df
 WHERE dtstatdate = '20250225' AND platid =255
)
SELECT
 CASE
 WHEN a.is_active_last_3m =0 THEN 'domain_term_011d8e557f'
 ELSE CASE WHEN rp.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain_term_8fef16a10e' ELSE 'domain_term_1f334c2cdf' END
 END AS user_type,
 COALESCE(hs.historical_segment,0) AS historical_segment,
 CASE
 WHEN hp.imoney IS NULL THEN '0'
 ELSE CASE
 WHEN (hp.imoney /100) <=1200 THEN '(0-1200]'
 WHEN (hp.imoney /100) <=6000 THEN '(1200-6000]'
 WHEN (hp.imoney /100) <=18000 THEN '(6000-18000]'
 ELSE '(18000+]'
 END
 END AS historical_payment_tier,
 COUNT(DISTINCT bu.vplayerid) AS user_count
FROM base_users bu
LEFT JOIN active_status a ON bu.vplayerid = a.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN recent_payment rp ON bu.vplayerid = rp.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN historical_segment hs ON bu.vplayerid = hs.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN historical_payment hp ON bu.vplayerid = hp.vplayerid
GROUP BY
 CASE
 WHEN a.is_active_last_3m =0 THEN 'domain_term_011d8e557f'
 ELSE CASE WHEN rp.vplayerid IS NOT NULL THEN 'domain_term_8fef16a10e' ELSE 'domain_term_1f334c2cdf' END
 END,
 COALESCE(hs.historical_segment,0),
 CASE
 WHEN hp.imoney IS NULL THEN '0'
 ELSE CASE
 WHEN (hp.imoney /100) <=1200 THEN '(0-1200]'
 WHEN (hp.imoney /100) <=6000 THEN '(1200-6000]'
 WHEN (hp.imoney /100) <=18000 THEN '(6000-18000]'
 ELSE '(18000+]'
 END
 END
ORDER BY user_type, historical_segment, historical_payment_tier;

WITH activity_user AS (
 SELECT
 suser AS vplayerid,
 MAX(CASE WHEN itype = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_exposed,
 MAX(CASE WHEN itype IN ('10','200','201','202','203','204','31','32','33','34','35','702','703') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_participated
 FROM dwd_jordass_mysteryplaylog_hi
 WHERE iactid = '1193536'
 AND SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 GROUP BY suser
),
user_status AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 CASE
 WHEN is_exposed = 1 AND is_participated = 0 THEN 'domain_term_c7b64cd031'
 WHEN is_exposed = 1 AND is_participated = 1 THEN 'domain_term_d440a94159'
 ELSE NULL
 END AS exposure_status
 FROM activity_user
 WHERE is_exposed = 1
),
traditional_mode AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 SUM(roundcnt) AS total_rounds,
 SUM(roundtime) AS total_time
 FROM dws_jordass_mode_roundrecord_di
 WHERE modename = 'domain_term_3b87e170bd'
 AND dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 GROUP BY vplayerid
),
active_data AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 SUM(ionlinetime) AS active_time
 FROM dws_jordass_login_di
 WHERE dtstatdate BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 AND platid = 255
 GROUP BY vplayerid
),
professional_match AS (
 SELECT
 vplayerid,
 COUNT(*) AS match_count
 FROM dwd_jordass_playerprofstagechange_hi
 WHERE tournamentid = 30002
 AND SUBSTR(tdbank_imp_date, 1, 8) BETWEEN '20240426' AND '20240505'
 GROUP BY vplayerid
)
SELECT
 us.exposure_status AS domain_term_2a0c6a9de0,
 COUNT(DISTINCT us.vplayerid) AS domain_term_ca62426403,
 COUNT(DISTINCT tm.vplayerid) AS domain_term_d15820c997,
 COALESCE(SUM(tm.total_rounds), 0) AS domain_term_e3c548248d,
 COALESCE(SUM(tm.total_time), 0) AS domain_term_67cd2e52d3,
 COUNT(DISTINCT ad.vplayerid) AS domain_term_d0e9de543d,
 COALESCE(SUM(ad.active_time), 0) AS domain_term_c4c9f57f0b,
 COUNT(DISTINCT pm.vplayerid) AS domain_term_8fb916d186,
 COALESCE(SUM(pm.match_count), 0) AS domain_term_4466c30ed0
FROM user_status us
LEFT JOIN traditional_mode tm ON us.vplayerid = tm.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN active_data ad ON us.vplayerid = ad.vplayerid
LEFT JOIN professional_match pm ON us.vplayerid = pm.vplayerid
GROUP BY us.exposure_status;

WITH target_dates AS (
 SELECT 20250429 AS dtstatdate
 UNION ALL
 SELECT 20250601 AS dtstatdate
),
login_df_data AS (
 SELECT
 t1.dtstatdate,
 t1.vplayerid,
 t1.dregdate,
 t1.cbitmap,
 CASE
 WHEN t1.dregdate = t1.dtstatdate THEN 'domain_term_2cd9e6ce81'
 WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 2, 7), '1') > 0 THEN '7domain_term_b7a40ed54a'
 WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 2, 7), '1') = 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 8, 7), '1') > 0 THEN '7~14domain_term_a00a2c22cc'
 WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 2, 14), '1') = 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 15, 16), '1') > 0 THEN '14~30domain_term_a00a2c22cc'
 WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 2, 30), '1') = 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 31, 60), '1') > 0 THEN '30~90domain_term_a00a2c22cc'
 WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 2, 90), '1') = 0 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(t1.cbitmap, 91), '1') > 0 THEN '90domain_term_ef4c784c10'
 ELSE 'domain_term_1a26edf94a'
 END AS user_type
 FROM dws_jordass_login_df t1
 INNER JOIN target_dates td ON t1.dtstatdate = td.dtstatdate
 WHERE t1.platid = 255
),
subsequent_login AS (
 SELECT
 t2.vplayerid,
 t2.dtstatdate AS login_date
 FROM dws_jordass_login_di t2
 WHERE t2.platid = 255
 AND (
 (t2.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20250430 AND 20250514)
 OR (t2.dtstatdate BETWEEN 20250602 AND 20250616)
 )
)
SELECT
 lf.dtstatdate,
 CASE
 WHEN sl.vplayerid IS NULL THEN 'domain_term_02be4896f1'
 ELSE 'domain_term_b2bc50a390'
 END AS login_status,
 lf.user_type,
 COUNT(DISTINCT lf.vplayerid) AS user_count
FROM login_df_data lf
LEFT JOIN subsequent_login sl ON lf.vplayerid = sl.vplayerid
GROUP BY lf.dtstatdate,
 CASE
 WHEN sl.vplayerid IS NULL THEN 'domain_term_02be4896f1'
 ELSE 'domain_term_b2bc50a390'
 END,
 lf.user_type
ORDER BY lf.dtstatdate, login_status, lf.user_type;
